name: BRAINS
subtitle: 24-Engine Macro-Oscillator
summary: 24-engine macro-oscillator based on Mutable Instruments Plaits. A bank/model matrix covers analogue, FM, physical modelling, wavetable, and noise engines. All four parameters (FREQ, HARMONICS, TIMBRE, MORPH) have direct knobs and CV-over-attenuverter inputs. Two simultaneous outputs carry different signals per engine.
